name: WH Ireland Group plc
summary: WH Ireland Group plc, a financial services company, provides wealth management, wealth planning, and corporate and institutional broking services primarily in the United Kingdom and the Isle of Man. It operates through two segments, Wealth Management, and Corporate and Institutional Broking. The Wealth Management segment provides bespoke wealth management solutions and independent financial advisory services to retail clients. This segment also provides savings and investments, retirement and pensions, and estate planning, as well as discretionary and advisory services to individuals, corporates, trusts, funds, and institutional clients. The Corporate Broking segment offers corporate finance, advisory, broking, research, market making, and fund raising services to small and mid-cap corporate clients. This segment also acts as nominated adviser to clients listed on the Alternative Investment Market and engages in the institutional sales and research business, which carries out stockbroking activities on behalf of companies, as well as conducting research into markets of interest to its clients. WH Ireland Group plc also serves corporate clients across technology, consumer, support services, healthcare, natural resources and industrials sectors. The company was founded in 1872 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
